creator: eoakes@comcast.net
text:
Downloaded and burned a cd of File:FreeBSD-8.1-RELEASE-i386-livefs.iso. Booting from this CD opened the freebsd install menus. The disk label is for the live cd.

I am pretty sure I was connect to ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/releases/i386/ISO-IMAGES/8.1/

Fix: 

Replace the file with the correct one
